title: Trump Administration's UFO Disclosure Phase 2: Next Batch of Files Expected Soon, Concerns about Release Speed
description: Representative Tim Burchett of Tennessee claims that the first release was only the beginning and teased that far more explosive material remained hidden from the public. Meanwhile, social media users and critics debate the accuracy of the government's promises to release the files and the potential controversy behind the slow pace of disclosure.

title: Fresh wave of UFO files to be released after Trump sparked chaos with alien picture
description: An update about the second phase of UFO disclosure has been released shortly after the president posted an image of himself standing with a handcuffed alien.

title: Trump’s Bizarre 'Handcuffed Alien' Image Ignites Explosive UFO Disclosure Chaos | WATCH
description: Donald Trump has triggered outrage and conspiracy theories after sharing an AI-generated image showing himself beside a handcuffed alien at a US military base. The bizarre post arrived days after the White House released new UFO files, sparking intense online debate over whether Trump was joking, trolling, or hinting at something bigger.

title: "Antichrist messages hidden in UFO files decoded by pastor." I'm sure this will be full of well-reasoned, cogent arguments backed by empirical evidence [Facepalm]
